issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Card states 'place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck' — this is ReturnToHand or a deck-positioning action, not trash/discard.
Missing action: 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active' — requires GiveDon or AttachDon action with appropriate filter for DON!! deck cards.
FlipLife is incorrect. Card states 'Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards' — this is AddLife (gaining life by adding deck cards), not flipping life totals.
Condition logic wrong. 'DON!! −1' means spend/consume 1 DON!!, not a HasRestingDon check. Should be a cost condition or HasAttachedDon with count ≥1.
